column1: # THE 1969 · Sybil Farm Audit · Top 45 receivers by lifetime BUSTS received
# Pattern: each "receiver" account got large numbers of small BUSTS transfers
# from many different X accounts in a short time window — clear sybil consolidation.
# Source: busts_ledger entries with reason "Received from @<sender>"
#   receiver_x_username   — the consolidating account (the sybil farmer's main wallet)
#   user_id               — internal user UUID for cross-reference
#   current_balance       — what's still in the account (most farmers already sold via OTC)
#   suspended             — whether anti-farm has already caught them
#   unique_senders        — how many distinct sybil accounts sent to them
#   total_busts_received  — sum of BUSTS received via P2P
#   first_at / last_at    — the activity window (typically minutes to hours)
